title: Michelle van Rensburg Audiology: your hearing is our priority
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Michelle van Rensburg is an...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Michelle van Rensburg is an Audiologist with two privately owned Audiology practices, located in Mossel Bay and Dana Bay. She also has a satellite practice in Hartenbos, which she visits once a month.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Michelle van Rensburg is an Audiologist with two privately owned Audiology practices, located in Mossel Bay and Dana Bay. She also has a satellite practice in Hartenbos, which she visits once a month."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Michelle has 23 years’ clinical experience in Audiology, including nine years of international experience. In 2022 she purchased an established practice from Lynette Snyman in Mossel Bay.","html":"Michelle has 23 years’ clinical experience in Audiology, including nine years of international experience. In 2022 she purchased an established practice from Lynette Snyman in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The services rendered at all practices include, but are not limited to:"},{"type":"list","items":["FREE hearing screening tests (to determine whether further management of hearing loss is necessary)","Adult and paediatric diagnostic hearing tests (to determine the degree and cause of hearing loss)","Fitting, programming and servicing of ANY type of hearing aid (Signia, Oticon, Widex, Beltone, Phonak, Phillips)","Custom-made noise protection against any form of noise exposure (shooting/motorcycles/machinery)","Supplying hearing aid accessories such as wax filters, batteries and drying capsules."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Apart from the services delivered at the practices, Michelle also delivers mobile Audiology services at most of the retirement villages in greater Mossel Bay. This is a convenient service for our elderly population, who cannot necessarily get to the practices for their hearing or hearing aid needs.","html":"Apart from the services delivered at the practices, Michelle also delivers mobile Audiology services at most of the retirement villages in greater Mossel Bay. This is a convenient service for our elderly population, who cannot necessarily get to the practices for their hearing or hearing aid needs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Best of Mossel Bay nomination is an extreme honour for us as a practice. Many thanks to all our loyal clients. Your hearing is our priority!","html":"The Best of Mossel Bay nomination is an extreme honour for us as a practice. Many thanks to all our loyal clients. Your hearing is our priority!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Contact us in advance for an appointment: 044 690 5511","html":"Contact us in advance for an appointment: 044 690 5511"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Vote here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/mossel-bay/"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
